title: astragalus khadem-kandicus
intro: Astragalus khadem-kandicus is a species of legume in the genus Astragalus, commonly known as milkvetch or goat's-thorn. It is a perennial plant that has been traditionally used in medicine for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties. The medicinal properties of Astragalus khadem-kandicus are attributed to its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve overall health and well-being. Herbal preparations of Astragalus khadem-kandicus, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, are commonly used to promote health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep, and enhancing physical performance.
